description: The Random Recommender Baseline is a simple, non-learned model that assigns random scores to items, optionally incorporating item popularity as a weighting factor. It serves as a performance lower bound to contextualize the effectiveness of learned sequential recommendation models like HSTU and SASRec.

code_difficulty.positive: A non-learned random recommender baseline. Scores are random draws, optionally weighted by item popularity. Serves as a lower-bound for comparing learned models (HSTU, SASRec, etc.).
